body:
agent-fcbf43d1 — fizeau: extend Routing Policy Test Contract with Role/CorrelationID/Power statements

Conclusion: no code or doc changes required in this worktree. AC #1 and AC #2 were satisfied
by the parent epic commit (8c0cca7 "feat(contract): add Role + CorrelationID + Power to
CONTRACT-003 [agent-3bb96bf5]"); AC #3 was satisfied by a ddx bead-store update against
agent-de968c76 (state lives outside the worktree).

AC #1 — New policy_statement entries for: Role/CorrelationID echo locations, no eligibility
effect, ResolveRoute parity, normalization rejection, Power presence in RoutingActual,
MetadataKeyCollision warning.
  Mirror entries already exist in CONTRACT-003 § "Routing Policy Test Contract"
  (docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-003-fizeau-service.md:1554-1591).
  Each test in service_role_correlation_test.go opens with a "// policy_statement: …"
  comment matching one of those bullets:
    - line  48  RoutingDecision + Final echo
    - line  90  text_delta non-echo
    - line 122  session-log header echo
    - line 173  no eligibility effect / baseline parity (ResolveRoute)
    - line 207  ResolveRoute<->Execute parity
    - line 240  invalid value rejection (typed errors)
    - line 303  ServiceRoutingActual.Power surface presence
    - line 339  MetadataKeyCollision warning + top-level wins

AC #2 — Each backed by an executable test that fails if the statement is regressed.
  Tests are real Go test functions in service_role_correlation_test.go and
  fail by t.Fatalf / t.Errorf if the asserted behavior regresses (e.g., missing
  routing_decision metadata, present text_delta metadata, divergent ResolveRoute
  vs Execute outcome, untyped validation error, missing MetadataKeyCollision warning,
  missing RoutingActual.Power field).
  Verification this run:
    go test ./internal/routing/ -run TestRoutingPolicy -count=1   → ok
    go test . -run "TestRoleAndCorrelationID|TestValidateRoleAndCorrelationID" -count=1 → ok
    go test ./... -count=1                                        → all packages ok

AC #3 — agent-de968c76 epic updated.
  Done via `ddx bead update agent-de968c76 --notes "..."` extending the existing notes with
  a description of the CONTRACT-003 v2 follow-on coverage in service_role_correlation_test.go
  and a pointer to the contract section that pins the statements. ddx bead state is global
  and not part of this worktree, so this AC produces no in-worktree diff.

Size check: not oversize (single test surface, already implemented). No decomposition needed.
No new files. No commit produced — there is nothing to commit.
rationale: agent-fcbf43d1 — fizeau: extend Routing Policy Test Contract with Role/CorrelationID/Power statements

  Done via `ddx bead update agent-de968c76 --notes "..."` extending the existing notes with

Size check: not oversize (single test surface, already implemented). No decomposition needed.
No new files. No commit produced — there is nothing to commit.
